pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17 bytecode and language features, failing to utilize or comply with Java 21 requirements.

src/main/java/com/caveanimal/stinger/ser.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for creating Path instances.
src/main/java/com/caveanimal/stinger/ser.why_exists: Paths.get() is deprecated for removal in Java 21; using it may cause deprecation warnings or future compilation errors depending on strictness settings.
